text: hi everybody this is a video of laparoscopic surgery done for gallstone ileus these gallstone ileus are rare complication of gallstones and they are defined as a mechanical intestinal obstruction due to impaction of one or more stones within the gastrointestinal tract the term ileus is a misnomer since the obstruction is true mechanical phenomenon they are more common in elderly female and generally occur one to four percent of all obstructions
